title: Add first non-record local smoke submission
author: retryoos

data.description: Reduced number of layers from 9 to 8

novel_contributions: First non-record submission with a complete local smoke workflow artifact
Demonstrated a simple architecture modification by reducing model depth from 9 to 8 layers
Documented baseline vs 8-layer MLX smoke runs including val_bpb, artifact size, and runtime trade-offs
Provided reproducible files including submission.json, run logs, and a small train_gpt.py launcher
Showed speed and size trade-off with slight regression in val_bpb on Apple Silicon MLX local smoke shard
